top_signals.title: US Yanks Waiver Allowing Iran Oil Sales After Attacks
top_signals.summary: The US Treasury Department revoked a waiver that allowed the sale of Iranian oil following new attacks on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sports-Related Deals on the Rise: William Blair
top_signals.summary: Acquisitions in the sports industry are set to increase as investors leverage a slew of different approaches to the fast-growing sector, according to William Blair & Co.’s head of investment banking.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Maine Senate race replacements circle amid pressure on Platner to drop out
top_signals.summary: Democrat Graham Platner has denied allegations of sexual assault leveled by Maine resident Jenny Racicot as calls for him to exit the pivotal race mount.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
